title: CTOV - Friends and Foes Compat
description: Compatibility add-on for Friends and Foes mod and CTOV
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Friends and Foes. You will find some copper golems and beekeepers in villages. 1.19+ datapack is for both Forge and Fabric. 

**Friends and Foes mod**

Friends and Foes mod for forge can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes-forge)

Friends and Foes mod for fabric can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes)

Friends and Foes mod for quilt can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes-quilt)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
